issues.sample: WITH FULL TANK OF GAS AND QUICK STOPS AND STARTS GAS SPILLS FROM THE TANK. IT'S IMPOSSIBLE TO MAKE THE TANK ANY TIGHTER. GASKET IS IN PLACE.
